name: betting-win-surebet
description: Dedicated surebet / complete-set strategy repo consuming betting-win provider truth; current implementation is private paper-only.

scripts.validate:boundary: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_contract_boundary.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_no_provider_connections.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_no_execution_paths.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_fixture_integrity.py
scripts.validate:ops: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_master_plan.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_executable_bits.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_artifact_hygiene.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_node_runtime_loader.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_shell_local_assignments.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_autonomous_controller_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_source_manifest.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_autonomous_continuation_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_local_engine_backlog_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_private_paper_mode_backlog_contract.py && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate_three_repo_surebet_boundary.py
scripts.validate:starter: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate:repo && npm run validate:boundary && npm run validate:ops
scripts.automation:status: bash run-autonomous-implementation.sh --status && bash run-paper-evaluation.sh --status && bash run-paper-autopilot.sh --status && bash run-autonomous-bugfix.sh --status
